---
title: "Lonely Together Wrangling 1"
author: "Peter Yibo Pan"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(knitr)
theme_set(theme_minimal())
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Step 1: Import data & initial analysis
```{r data}
LTdata1 <- read_csv("Lonely Together data 1.csv")
glimpse(LTdata1)

## need to select only relevant columns
LTdata2 <- LTdata1 %>% select(contains("q00")) %>%
  glimpse()
test <- is.na(LTdata2$q0001)
Ineligible 

## need to get list of column names & import into vector

## use vector to rename columns
```


```{r scores, echo=FALSE}
## questions 1-4 is eligibility screening & consent

## questions 5-12 is demographics

## questions 13, 14, and 15 are RHI

## questions 16 is DJGLS
```
